holdings.infoBox: SEIM is an equity ETF with a total of 69 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 7.35%, NVIDIA at 6.59%, Sandisk at 4.11%, Lam Research at 3.44%, and Apple at 3.07%.

overview.description: The SEI Enhanced U.S. Large Cap Momentum Factor ETF (SEIM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed fund of large-cap US companies, exhibiting strong momentum. Selection is based on a quantitative model and an optimization process. SEIM was launched on May 18, 2022 and is issued by SEI.
